_doc: Generated doctrine lattice coverage projection. Source authority remains the JSON standards, relation registry, organ registry, organ atlas, and paper modules.
anti_claim: Coverage counts are structural presence and validator health, not proof of correctness, completeness, release readiness, or permission to promote generated suggestions as doctrine.

anti_principle_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Anti-principle JSON presence is migration progress, not proof that every failed-principle relation is obligation-mapped.

axiom_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Axiom JSON presence is migration progress, not proof that every axiom is witnessed or that source authority has flipped from the routing registry.

concept_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Concept JSON presence is migration progress, not proof that every concept is principle-grounded, axiom-constrained, or mechanism-instantiated.

cycle: land one reversible patch or open WorkItem/cap
must_not: mint axioms to satisfy an organ
mint principles to satisfy an organ
promote candidate doctrine into public source
treat generated projections as source authority

mechanism_capsule_dependency_upstream_pa.relation_direction: paper_module A depends_on paper_module B maps to mechanism(B).upstream_of mechanism(A); the reverse direction is not inferred from depends_on.

mechanism_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Mechanism JSON presence is migration progress; resolved code-locus paths do not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or complete concept/sibling wiring.

paper_module_corpus.strangler_rule: Markdown remains legacy/import projection until JSON instances and capsules round-trip structurally; legacy-only JSON rows are import indexes, not authority upgrades.

suppressed_legacy_markdown_aliases.reason: Reader-boundary alias for the same accepted probe organ already explained by paper_module.tactic_portfolio_availability; importing it as an independent legacy row double-counts a readiness blocker.

paper_module_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Paper-module JSON parity is structural migration progress; legacy-only rows remain import indexes and do not prove capsule authority, typed subjects, or runtime correctness.

principle_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Principle JSON presence is migration progress, not proof that every principle is obligation-supported or governs all downstream concepts/mechanisms.

projection_freshness.stale_source_behavior: If any source digest changes, regenerate before acting on coverage counts.

public_codex_leak_guard.anti_claim: This guard checks public-facing narrative prose for brand leakage. Provenance refs to copied macro paths remain a separate allowed-source-ref class.

skill_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Skill JSON presence is migration progress, not proof that every skill has complete mechanism/concept neighbours, runtime correctness, or agent uptake.

standard_instance_corpus.anti_claim: Standard JSON inventory is projected as lattice coverage only; draft or legacy contracts and planned triad skills remain explicit residual pressure.
